name: Marvelous Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 servings of Stove Top Stuffing chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and remove the stems.
2. Prepare the Stove Top Stuffing according to package directions.
3. Pour 2 tablespoons (or 1/4 cup) of the white cooking wine into a baking dish.
4. Fill each mushroom with about 2 teaspoons of stuffing.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top of each stuffed mushroom.
6. Place the mushrooms in the baking dish and bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
